message:
You know that one friend who always seems to have everything together? Well, that’s me when it comes to storm prep! A few years back, we were bracing for a big winter storm, and I had my emergency kit all set—flashlights, extra blankets, snacks, you name it. I even had a board game ready to go, just in case we lost power and needed to keep the kiddos entertained. 

When the storm hit, we ended up cozied up with hot cocoa and a few rounds of Monopoly, while neighbors were just scrambling to find candles. It felt good to be the ‘over-prepared’ one, even if I joked about it at the time. 

I guess the takeaway is that a little planning goes a long way in keeping the vibes calm and cozy, even when the weather outside is anything but. Have you ever found yourself unexpectedly prepared for a storm? What’s your go-to item in your emergency stash? This little refresher helped me keep my kit up to date!
